creator: mnd999@gmail.com
text:
Should be fixed in 1.5.1 port, I'm surprised to hear it's not. On my system the output of this command includes the FreeBSD native library:

jar tvf /usr/local/share/spark/lib/spark-assembly-1.5.1-hadoop2.7.1.jar | grep libsnappy

 25832 Thu Nov 05 19:27:40 GMT 2015 org/xerial/snappy/native/FreeBSD/x86_64/libsnappyjava.so

Do you not have that packaged?
